reason: Logic-only fix in the target editor's rules list. After a programmatic select (add, duplicate or move a rule) the newly selected row could land below the scroll fold of the fixed-height list; RebuildMaster now calls BringIntoView on the selected row, deferred to the Loaded dispatcher priority so it sees final layout. No visual language, layout, styling or palette change — the list looks identical, it just no longer leaves the selected row hidden.
